name: yerros
description: Plugins by yerros — context engineering for AI-driven development.

plugins.name: context-forge
plugins.description: Set up and maintain the Six-File Context Methodology in any project: initialize context files, refine prompts, plan and build features, verify, debug, log decisions, audit for drift, and resume — with lightweight, token-free command hooks that auto-load context, record activity, and guard generated/protected files.
